content.text:
Context: This summary will be shown in a list to help users and Claude choose which conversations are relevant.

Please write a concise, factual summary that synthesizes these part-summaries into one cohesive paragraph. Focus on what was accomplished and any notable technical decisions or challenges. Output in <summary></summary> tags. Claude will see this summary when searching previous conversations for useful memories and information.

Part summaries:
1. Removed all Angular references from worklog.md and handoff.md (Material theme, ng test commands, AppComponent guard patterns, 980kB bundle details). Retained all backend cycle decisions, Tibero/MyBatis patterns, and current React-based workflow status. Both docs now reflect React 18 + Vite + shadcn/ui architecture.
2. Continued React migration: (1) Analyzed directory structure and confirmed main.jsx→Providers→router.jsx design is correct; App.jsx is unused and will be deleted. (2) Identified 10 cleanup items: deleted App.jsx, AppRouter.jsx, test/setup.js, src/index.html, core/models/pageResponse.js, and unified scattered utility files. (3) Migrated 5 API files (domainApi, importApi, wordApi, forbiddenApi, authApi) from deprecated http.js to axiosInstance.js, adding unwrapResponse helper to handle backend response format {success, data, message}. (4) Moved ProtectedRoute from src/router/ to src/app/ to align with design structure. (5) Build validation passed.
3. 분석 결과 HttpOnly Cookie 기반 인증으로 설계. localStorage XSS 취약점을 제거하고 SameSite=Strict CSRF 방어를 추가하는 방식 채택. 설계 문서 작성 완료, 백엔드(CookieProperties, JwtAuthenticationFilter) 및 프론트엔드(axiosInstance, providers) 구현 준비.
4. 사용자가 이전 작업 중 구현한 DataGrid 컴포넌트가 실제로 Grid 라이브러리를 사용하지 않고 있는지 확인을 요청했습니다. 현재 프로젝트 구조 파악을 위해 파일을 검색했으나, React 컴포넌트 파일을 찾을 수 없는 상태입니다. 프로젝트가 전통적인 Java 웹 애플리케이션(jqGrid, DataTables 같은 레거시 Grid 라이브러리 포함)으로 보여, 이전에 가정한 React 기반 구조와 다릅니다. 현재 실제 프로젝트 구조와 그리드 라이브러리 사용 현황을 파악해야 합니다.
5. User switched DataGrid from `@tanstack/react-table` + shadcn Table to AG Grid Community v35 with SheetJS for Excel export, completing migration with passing tests. Then initiated brainstorming for MCP (Model Context Protocol) server design to add naming validation tool (checking DB column/table/Java identifier names against standard terminology database, suggesting alternatives, or creating custom non-standard terms). Completed design approval across 4 sections (architecture, tool list, data model, security) and committed design document to git.
6. User wanted documentation updated to match current source code. Found major discrepancies: frontend tech stack listed as Angular 15 + Material but actual codebase is React 19.2.6 + Vite 8 + shadcn/ui + Zustand + TanStack Query; dev port 4200 vs actual 5173; AG Grid v35 + SheetJS adoption not documented. Updated CLAUDE.md, conventions-frontend.md, and decisions.md to reflect actual stack, added Grid migration decision entry, and removed outdated technologies (Angular, Apache POI, Husky).

Good:
<summary>Built conversation search system with JavaScript, sqlite-vec, and local embeddings. Implemented hierarchical summarization for long conversations. System archives conversations permanently and provides semantic search via CLI.</summary>

Bad:
<summary>This conversation synthesizes several topics discussed across multiple parts...</summary>

Your summary (max 200 words):

<summary>
Completed React migration from Angular to React 19.2.6 + Vite 8 + shadcn/ui architecture. Removed all Angular references (Material theme, ng test commands, bundle details) from documentation and codebase. Deleted unused files (App.jsx, AppRouter.jsx, test/setup.js, src/index.html) and migrated 5 API files from deprecated http.js to axiosInstance.js with unwrapResponse helper for backend response format handling. Repositioned ProtectedRoute to align with design structure. Implemented HttpOnly Cookie-based authentication with SameSite=Strict CSRF protection, replacing vulnerable localStorage approach. Switched DataGrid from @tanstack/react-table to AG Grid Community v35 with SheetJS for Excel export. Designed MCP server for naming validation tool to check database and Java identifier names against standard terminology. Updated all project documentation (CLAUDE.md, conventions-frontend.md, decisions.md) to reflect actual tech stack, including Grid migration decision entry. Build validation passed with all tests green.
</summary>
